title: Clumps
description: Merge experience orbs and instant pickup experience orbs to reduce lag!
body:
# Clumps

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ly-clumps?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ly-clumps)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)
[![Donate](https://shields.io/badge/ko--fi-donate-ff5f5f?logo=ko-fi)](https://ko-fi.com/lullaby45743)

---

![Example](https://i.imgur.com/bLjOgrM.png)

---

## 📖 Description

Merge experience orbs and instant pickup experience orbs to reduce lag!

---

## ⌨️ Commands

Config:

```mcfunction
/function clumps:config
```

Instant pickup experience orbs option is not compatible with Mending enchantment!
